tools.name: users_list
tools.description: List all users in a Slack team

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

params.name: include_locale
params.description: Set to true to receive the locale for users.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

tools.name: conversations_list
tools.description: List all channels in a Slack team

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

params.name: types
params.description: Mix of channel types to include, comma separated.

params.name: exclude_archived
params.description: Set to true to exclude archived channels.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

tools.name: emoji_list
tools.description: List custom emoji for a team

params.name: include_categories
params.description: Set to true to return a list of emoji categories.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

tools.name: conversations_history
tools.description: Fetch a conversation's history of messages and events

params.name: channel
params.description: Conversation ID to fetch history for.

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

params.name: oldest
params.description: Only messages after this Unix timestamp will be included.

params.name: latest
params.description: Only messages before this Unix timestamp will be included.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

params.name: channel
params.description: Conversation ID to learn more about.

params.name: include_locale
params.description: Set to true to receive the locale for this conversation.

params.name: include_num_members
params.description: Set to true to include the member count for the channel.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

tools.name: chat_post_message
tools.description: Send a message to a channel

params.name: channel
params.description: Channel, private group, or IM channel to send message to.

params.name: text
params.description: The formatted text of the message to be published.

params.name: thread_ts
params.description: Provide another message's ts value to make this a reply.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present
